# Kwizzo
> AI-powered family quiz game. Create and play quizzes on any topic in 30 seconds, no account needed.

## What this site does
Kwizzo generates unique quiz questions on any topic instantly using AI. It supports family multiplayer with age-adaptive difficulty — kids get easier questions, adults get harder. Requires no account to start playing.

## Who it's for
Families with children of any age. Great for quiz nights, road trips, and learning at home. Suitable for ages 5 to adult.

## Key features
- Instant AI quiz generation on 100+ categories or any custom topic
- Age-adaptive questions per player
- Family multiplayer mode with live leaderboard
- 5 free rounds per session — no account or card required
- Works on any device in a browser — no download

## Pricing
Free tier: 5 rounds per session, 10 categories, solo and group modes.
Pro tier: £3.99/month — unlimited rounds, all 100+ categories, custom quiz creation, no ads, export scorecards.

## URLs
Base: https://kwizzo.app
Play: https://kwizzo.app/play
Pricing: https://kwizzo.app/#pricing
